name: Spotlight Cards
description: Dark cards with cursor-tracking spotlight effect, border glow using CSS mask compositing, and scroll-triggered entrance animations.
accessibility_notes: cards are decorative — ensure content is accessible
needs reduced-motion fallback for entrance animations

embedded.description: Render only the card grid without the section wrapper

conflicts: spotlight effect invisible on touch devices without hover
CSS mask compositing not supported in all browsers
usage_tip: Best for dark-themed feature or pricing cards; desktop hover required.
